name: Pet Life Anti Ticks Birds Bath Shampoo 200 Ml + Birds Feather Conditioner 200 Ml-Waterless/Spray For Poultry Birds, Parrots, Sparrows, Pigeon –Cleaner/Shinier Coat & Soft/Silky Feathers- All Bird Type
description: Anti Ticks Birds Bath - We have brought an amazing bath cleanser for your pet. Infused with Neem, Haldi, and Aloe Vera extract. Pet Life ticks birds bath is a revolutionary product for overall health of your birds. It cleanses instantly with effectiveness and softens feathers and fur, supple skin, protects against ticks, fleas, and another microorganism. A product highly in demand globally that will fulfill all your needs to ensure your birds stay healthy and active with full of health. This is a Vegan product that is sulphate free, Cruelty free, Paraben free with bird friendly aroma. Regular
